videoSnippet.title: Only He Could See Such a Move || Vasyl Ivanchuk vs Veselin Topalov || Novgorod (1996)
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator

Vasyl Ivanchuk vs Veselin Topalov
Novgorod (1996), Novgorod RUS, rd 8, Jul-29
Sicilian Defense: Scheveningen. Classical Variation (B84)

1. e4 c5 2. Nf3 d6 3. d4 cd4 4. Nd4 Nf6 5. Nc3 a6 6. Be2 e6 7. O-O Be7 8. f4 O-O 9. Kh1 Qc7 10. a4 Nc6 11. Be3 Re8 12. Bf3 Rb8 13. g4 Bf8 14. g5 Nd7 15. Bg2 Nd4 16. Bd4 b5 17. ab5 ab5 18. Ra7 Qd8 19. b4 e5 20. Be3 ef4 21. Bf4 Ne5 22. Nd5 Bg4 23. Qd2 Nc6 24. g6 Na7 25. gf7 Kh8 26. Bg5 Qd7 27. fe8N Re8 28. Qf2 Kg8 29. e5 h6 30. Nb6 Qc7 31. Bd5 Kh7 32. Be4 Kg8 33. Nd5 Qd7 34. Ne7

0:01 Hello Everyone!
01:10 Game Starts!
03:40 CNG!
11:00 It WaS IN this Position!
